title: Varasia crassuloides
taxonomy: Varasia crassuloides is classified within the family Crassulaceae. This classification places it in the order Saxifragales. As a member of the Crassulaceae family, it shares characteristics with other succulent plants. The species is also a part of the genus Varasia, which is closely related to other genera within the family. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
uses: Varasia crassuloides is native to South Africa, but information about its medicinal uses is limited.
